PlainEnglishExplanation: SGOV is the cash/T-bill sleeve. The model uses it when it does not want the full portfolio in risk ETFs, usually because market breadth is weaker or the selected ETF basket is too volatile.
SavedReason: Cash/volatility-control sleeve or cash residual after pruning.
